feature.name: Bidirectional mapping core
feature.description: Extract bidict mutable/frozen/ordered bidirectional mappings with inverse views, duplicate policies, and ordered move_to_end without importing bidict.
included_behaviors: forward and inverse lookups on bidict and frozenbidict
inverse view reflects live updates on mutable bidicts
ON_DUP_RAISE duplicate value/key policies with typed errors
OrderedBidict preserves insertion order and move_to_end
inverted() iterator helper for value-key pairs
excluded_behaviors: upstream benchmarks, docs, and test suite

entanglement.description: Bidict couples forward/inverse backing dicts, duplicate-action policies, weakref-linked inverse views, and ordered linked-list nodes for OrderedBidict.
signals: _fwdm/_invm weakref pairs keep inverse in sync on mutation
OnDup policies branch raises vs drop-old across key/value collisions
OrderedBidictBase maintains sentinel doubly-linked list for order
GeneratedBidictInverse proxies mutations back to parent bidict

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import bidict, frozenbidict, OrderedBidict, ON_DUP_RAISE, ValueDuplicationError, KeyAndValueDuplicationError, inverted
